scenario.name: PhoneBlock Dongle Mock Registrar (TCP) + Spam Caller
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTagReg[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Contact:];expires=300 Server: SIPp Mock Registrar (TCP, PhoneBlock dongle test-rig) Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Spam Caller" <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagInv[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: invite-[pid]-[call_number]@[local_ip] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp Spam Caller (PhoneBlock dongle test-rig, TCP) Subject: Spam call test (TCP) Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=caller 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=Spam call test c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Spam Caller" <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagInv[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: invite-[pid]-[call_number]@[local_ip] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Spam Caller" <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagInv[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: invite-[pid]-[call_number]@[local_ip] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
